mano_cua.result_summary: 应用崩溃无法渲染，与 reactgrid-205 相同问题。循环依赖导致 TDZ ReferenceError（Cannot access 'ReactGrid' before initialization at PartialArea.tsx:11）。React 根元素为空，页面完全空白。所有路由（/、/sticky-left-columns）均相同错误。stickyLeftColumns 功能无法测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Application crashes with same circular dependency ReferenceError as reactgrid-205. PartialArea.tsx references ReactGrid before initialization. All routes show same error. Page completely blank after dismissing error overlay.
